overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan walking through a mountainous wilderness area on an overcast day. The character navigates grassy hillsides, rocky trails, and passes a horseback rider while heading toward distant snow-capped peaks.

events.description: character crouches down briefly while moving through tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and navigating around large rock formations on the hillside

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree framing the right side of the view
open terrain with tall green and yellow grass covering the ground
large grey rock formations scattered across the landscape
distant view of forested valley below with misty mountains in background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassy mountainside with scattered boulders and a large pine tree on the right. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting over the valley view in the distance. At around 11 seconds, the character briefly crouches while navigating the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with steep hillside

events.description: transition from open grassland to defined rocky dirt path
horseback rider passes by going opposite direction on the trail

agents.ego_description: navigating around a large boulder formation on the left while following the rocky trail uphill

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse down the trail in the opposite direction, passing the ego character

entered.detail: narrow winding trail with loose rocks and dirt surface
rocky slope rising sharply on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a defined rocky trail winding around large boulders with a steep hillside on the left. A horseback rider appears ahead and passes by going downhill. The terrain shifts from open grass to an enclosed mountain path.

events.description: snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible ahead as the trail curves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on the trail toward the distant snow-capped mountains, flanked by pine trees

entered.detail: large mountain peak with white snow visible on the summit against the grey sky
steep rock face rising alongside the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the mountain trail, now with dense pine trees lining the path. Around the 58-second mark, a majestic snow-capped mountain peak comes into view ahead. The trail becomes more defined as it winds through the alpine terrain with rocky cliffs on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast mountainous wilderness that transforms from open grassy slopes into a rugged alpine trail. It begins with the character navigating an open mountainside scattered with boulders and a large pine tree under a diffused, overcast sky. As the terrain shifts, the open grass gives way to an enclosed rocky path where the camera follows the character past a horseback rider descending the steep hillside. The scene then expands as the trail ascends further, winding through dense pine forests and along rocky cliffs. Finally, the path opens up to reveal a majestic snow-capped mountain peak looming ahead in the distance.
